zh.lifeSummary: 當Valentine Hughes於1635年10月26日出生在英國威爾斯波斯利安盧根時，他的父親Richard Hughes25歲，母親Ellinor Semple26歲。他於1659年與Fortune Gwilym在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾利安盧根結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1723年1月11日在英國英格蘭素瑞享年87歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Valentine Hughes于1635年10月26日出生在英国威尔斯波斯利安盧根时，他的父亲Richard Hughes25岁，母亲Ellinor Semple26岁。他于1659年与Fortune Gwilym在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾利安盧根结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1723年1月11日在英国英格兰素瑞享年87岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hughes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Hugh with genitival or excrescent -s.
Irish and Scottish: adopted as an equivalent of Gaelic surnames based on the personal name Aodh ‘fire’, for example Ó hAodha, Mac Aodha; see McCoy and compare McHugh .

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: Valentine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Latin name Valentinus, a derivative of valens ‘healthy, strong’. This was the name of a Roman martyr of the 3rd century, whose feast is celebrated on 14 February . This was the date of a pagan fertility festival marking the first stirrings of spring, which has survived in an attenuated form under the patronage of the saint.

en.lifeSummary: When Valentine Hughes was born on 26 October 1635, in Llanllugan, Powys, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Hughes, was 25 and his mother, Ellinor Semple, was 26. He married Fortune Gwilym in 1659, in Llanllugan, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 11 January 1723, in Surrey, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Valentine Hughes est né le 26 octobre 1635, à Llanllugan, Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Hughes, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Ellinor Semple, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Fortune Gwilym en 1659, à Llanllugan, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 11 janvier 1723, à Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 87 ans.

Er hat 1659 in Llanllugan, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom Fortune Gwilym geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 11. Januar 1723 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Surrey, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Valentine Hughes(이)가 1635년 10월 26일 영국 웨일스 파우이스 랜루건에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Hughes(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellinor Semple(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1659년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르 랜루건에서 Fortune Gwilym(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1723년 1월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 수리에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Valentine Hughes родился 26 октября 1635 г. в местности лланллуган, поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Hughes было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellinor Semple, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Fortune Gwilym в 1659 г. в местности лланллуган, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 11 января 1723 г. в местности сурри, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 87 лет.
